introSection: Speedway Stunt Coaster is a steel roller coaster currently located at Six Flags Mexico in Mexico City, Mexico.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was first publicly acknowledged in a press release on 14 November 2024.

An planning application for construction was filed in May 2025.

Parts for the coaster arrived at the park on 23 July 2025.

On 4 August 2025, Six Flags Mexico officially announced the ride would open as Speedway Stunt Coaster in 2026.

On 10 January 2026, it was announced that the roller coaster would open on 31 January. It opened on this date, following a media preview event held the previous day.

fullText:
Speedway Stunt Coaster is a steel roller coaster currently located at Six Flags Mexico in Mexico City, Mexico.

The ride was first publicly acknowledged in a press release on 14 November 2024.

An planning application for construction was filed in May 2025.

Parts for the coaster arrived at the park on 23 July 2025.

On 4 August 2025, Six Flags Mexico officially announced the ride would open as Speedway Stunt Coaster in 2026.

On 10 January 2026, it was announced that the roller coaster would open on 31 January. It opened on this date, following a media preview event held the previous day.
